message:
test(robot): add unit tests for section projection and renderer parity [bd-j9jo3.9.9]

- Add dashboard section limit tests (tier ordering verification)
- Add GetDashboardAttentionSection tests (feed availability, data type)
- Add GetTerseProjection tests (truncation, limits)
- Add format hints tests (all sections, terse format)
- Add empty array semantics tests
- Add alerts section truncation tests
- Add RenderMarkdownFromProjection tests (basic, compact, truncation, empty)

Tests cover section assembly, renderer projections, truncation semantics,
and format hints as specified in the robot-redesign validation beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
